name: Creamed Carrot Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a kettle.
2. Saute the vegetables until onions are clear.
3. Blend in flour.
4. Mix in broth and stir until smooth.
5. Simmer covered for 30 minutes.
6. Put soup through a blender to puree.
7. Stir in milk.
8. Adjust the seasonings.
9. Stir until hot, but not boiling.
10. Ladle into bowls and sprinkle nutmeg on top.
